text:
Hello Joseph,

Saturday, September 23, 2006, 5:56:48 PM, you wrote:

>>Number:         103522
>>Category:       www
>>Synopsis:       Search interface oddity

> Searching for 'FreeBSD' using the search box returns 'Nothing found'.

Ah well, the search box is really broken, I think we should finally
switch to google/yahoo search as proposed in the past...

Best regards,
 Daniel                            mailto:danger@FreeBSD.org
